root_causes: Documented staging acceptance order contradicted the actual deploy topology.
CI contract checks were treated as proof of the deployed end-to-end data chain.
Environment, stable data identity and pre-write evidence were not mandatory merge inputs.
Real data correction, system diagnosis and acceptance were mixed in one loop.
No enforceable stop-the-line rule existed after an unexpected real-data mutation.
preventive_controls: Candidate phased work and acceptance model, subject to validation
Candidate per-PR machine-readable change manifest, subject to validation
Candidate governance CI validator, subject to validation
Candidate separation of isolated integration, staging deployment and real staging acceptance
Candidate environment and data identity evidence for source/writeback changes
Proposed prohibition of live write tests

rollback_plan: Close or discard this draft proposal branch. No runtime, deployment configuration or external data is changed by this workpack.
